layout_and_spacing.strategy: Microsoft 365 Enterprise Structure mixed with Organic spacing

buttons.primary: bg-[#0F1E38] text-white hover:bg-[#1A2A44] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.accent: bg-[#C5A028] text-white hover:bg-[#D4AF37] transition-colors rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-[#0F1E38] text-[#0F1E38] hover:bg-[#F3EFE9] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#E5E1D8] rounded-md px-4 py-2.5 focus:border-[#C5A028] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A028] outline-none transition-all

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-[#FDFBF7] border-r border-[#E5E1D8]
navigation.topbar: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#E5E1D8]

onboarding.container: max-w-xl mx-auto mt-20 p-8 bg-white border border-[#E5E1D8] rounded-xl shadow-sm
onboarding.transitions: framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth step transitions (fade in/out, slight slide up)

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA compliant minimum 4.5:1 for normal text
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='submit-prayer-btn')

choir.description: Church choir singing in front of altar

instructions_to_main_agent: Use a Light theme. The app is 'CelestialPeopleMeeet'. It must look like a high-end enterprise app (M365) but feel reverent.
Implement conversational onboarding (one question per step using Framer Motion). Do not use a standard static signup form.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings to bring the church feel, and 'Manrope' for body copy for legibility. Add them to Google Fonts.
Primary colors are Ivory (#FDFBF7 background), Navy Blue (#0F1E38 primary text/buttons), and Gold (#C5A028 accents). DO NOT use purple.
UI components should use Shadcn but stripped of the Vercel look: use 1px borders, subtle colors, and zero overbearing box-shadows.
The layout must have a sticky topbar and, on desktop, a left sidebar for the heavy navigation structure.
All interactive elements MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes.
